title: Premier Housewares Wall Clock, Metal, Red, 38 x 10 x 38 cm
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Material: the wall clock comes with a metal frame that not only looks good but ensures the wall clock will stand the test of time.
Practical: complementing the red frame is the white clock face that features black numbers, batons, and hands.
Requirements: the wall clock for living room requires 2 x AA batteries (not supplied)
Care instructions: in order to clean this wall clock wipe clean with a soft cloth.
Dimensions: the dimensions of the kitchens wall clock are height x width x depth: 38 cm x 38 cm x 10 cm
description: Product Description This amazing wall clock by Premier Housewares is the perfect option to use as a living wall clock or a kitchens wall clock. An elegant and practical feature on your wall, the chic red clock will remind you that better late than never, but never late is better. The clock also comes with a metal frame that not only looks great but ensures the clock will stand the test of time. Moreover, complementing the red frame is the white clock face that features black numbers, batons, and hands, with a red seconds hand, making it easy to read, even at a glance. The features that make the clock so amazing include: - Comes with a red frame giving it a great look - Made using good quality materials ensuring its durability - Has a great size making it perfect for your living room - Comes with large numbers making it easier for you to read This incredible ticking clock is great for the bedroom, living room as well as kitchen. Suitable for use in my room, the contemporary style wall clock will help you keep track of time. Manufacturer's Description Premier Housewares LTD is part of a family run group of companies with over 50 years of trading experience and prides itself as one of the UK’s leading suppliers and distributors of housewares and home lifestyle products to the retail trade. First established in 1988, Premier Housewares has grown to a market leader in its industry, based in a head office of over 340,000 sq feet on the banks of the River Clyde, close to the heart of Glasgow, Scotland. With an extensive product portfolio that covers kitchenware, tabletop and bathroom accessories, as well as soft furnishing, decorative accessories, lighting and furniture, Premier’s aim is to provide a complete solution to housewares retailing needs by offering a comprehensive collection of coordinating products in eye-catching packaging. We pride ourselves on offering one of the most comprehensive ranges of housewares in the industry and ensure that as our range continues to develop our emphasis is always on classic, contemporary design. Premier’s range is constantly reviewed and developed by a team of buyers dedicated to each specific product area. Box Contains 1 x Wall Clock, Metal, Red See more
